D1 Optics L6 Create Reference

Surface-Enhanced Raman Hot Spots

squeeze two gold nanoparticles together and watch the Raman signal explode

At a plasmon resonance the gap between two metal nanoparticles concentrates the field enormously. Because Raman scales as the local field to the fourth power, tiny gaps give astronomical enhancement.

Tighten the nanogap, tune the laser toward the plasmon resonance, and set the particle size. The hot-spot glow and the enhancement factor (log scale) track the local field.
